tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly elevated, indicating possible mild renal impairment. Total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may reflect a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Other parameters, including lipids and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and follow-up for glycemic control and renal function.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
